hero.title: Let's shape the right support for your next initiative.
hero.description: Whether you need participatory planning, organisational development, MEL support, or a thought partner for implementation, we can start with a focused conversation.

channels.title: Email
channels.note: Best for proposals, partnership ideas, and detailed briefs.

channels.title: WhatsApp
channels.note: Useful for quick questions and follow-ups.

channels.title: LinkedIn
channels.note: A simple way to stay connected and see updates.

officeNote.title: How we usually begin
officeNote.description: Most engagements start with a short discovery conversation. From there, we can shape a scoped consultation, workshop, assessment, or implementation support plan.

cta.title: Need to share more context first?
cta.description: Use the inquiry form on this page to draft an email with your project details. You can update the email and WhatsApp values in this JSON file anytime.
